author: Aaij, R. and others
title: Test of lepton universality with $B^{0} \rightarrow K^{*0}\ell^{+}\ell^{-}$ decays
abstract: a test of lepton universality, performed by measuring the ratio of the branching fractions of the $B^0 \to K^{\ast0} \mu^+ \mu^-$ and $B^0 \to K^{\ast0} e^+ e^−$ decays, $R_{K^{\ast0}}$, where the $K^{\ast0}$ meson is reconstructed in the ﬁnal state $K^+ \pi^−$, using proton-proton collision data with an integrated luminosity of about 3 fb$^{−1}$ at centre-of-mass energies of 7 and 8 TeV
